---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a feature
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
---

## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve? Be specific about the use case.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like, including API shape or behavior if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Any workarounds or alternative solutions you've considered and why they fall short.

## Additional Context

Links to prior art, papers, or related discussions.
